title: Environment Considerations for MySQL
text: Environment Considerations for MySQL Network Considerations Both the Uniface Server and MySQL Server network capabilities can be used. The Uniface Server is used to connect Uniface to the connector, and the MySQL Server network capabilities are used to communicate between the connector and the MySQL Server database. Permissions The MySQL Server installation program sets up permissions so that all users can read the necessary system tables by default. However, database owners can control the permissions on the system tables in their own databases. See your MySQL documentation for permissions on tables and databases. Unicode The MySQL connector supports the use of Unicode in fields with a W packing code, table and columns names, user names and passwords, and in SQL. However, this functionality is disabled by default. To enable it, use the Unicode connector option. Was this topic helpful? Like Dislike
